title: Trump says deal possible 'this weekend' — 'negotiation going very well'; claims Iran 'really wants' a deal
snippet: Trump says 'I hear the negotiation itself is going very well, actually. Very well' and 'if it happens, it could happen, like, over the weekend.' Claims Iran 'really wants' a deal. Directly contradicts Iran's 'no progress' statement from Araghchi. Continues pattern of Trump optimism vs Iran caution in public messaging.
tag_reason: 신규 사건 — 트럼프가 이란 딜이 '이번 주말'에 가능할 수 있다고 발언. 이란 아라그치의 '진전 없음'과 정면 모순. Day 95-96 '메시지 전쟁'의 연장이나, 구체적 시한('this weekend')은 새로운 요소
